zh.lifeSummary: 當Magred verch Herbert於1419年出生在威爾士蒙姆爾拉格藍時，她的父親Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG18歲，母親Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam35歲。她和Henry Dwnn至少有3個兒子和7個女兒。她去世在威爾士布洛可爾維斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magred verch Herbert于1419年出生在威尔士蒙姆爾拉格藍时，她的父亲Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG18岁，母亲Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam35岁。她和Henry Dwnn至少有3个儿子和7个女儿。她去世在威尔士布洛可爾維斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: verch
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.
German: variant of   Ferch  .

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

nameMeanings.name: Herbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German, English, and French: from a personal name composed of the ancient Germanic elements heri, hari ‘army’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. In Britain, this Old French name, introduced by the Normans, reinforced the less common Old English cognate Herebeorht. The surname was taken to Ireland after the Anglo-Norman invasion and in the 16th century.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name (see 1 above).

variants.name: Harbison
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name Herbert (the change from -er- to -ar- was a common one in Old French and Middle English). An intrusive n later gave Harbinson .

variants.name: Hebard
meanings: English (Surrey):
variant of Herbert , with assimilation of the first r. Compare Hebb .
variant of   Hibbert  .

variants.name: Harbert
meanings: German and English: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbers
meanings: German and Dutch: patronymic from   Herbert  . It is found mainly in Lower Saxony and across the Dutch border.

variants.name: Dickherber
meanings: Probably a nickname for a fat person by the name of Herbert , of which Herber is a short form, or, more likely, in the north from Die(c)kherber, a topographic and distinguishing name for a Herber living by the dike, see Dicke 2. Compare Dickmeyer .

variants.name: Hebert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Emile, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Pierre, Lucien, Michel, Gaston, Alcide, Camille.
French (Hébert): assimilated form of Herbert . Compare Abair , Abar , Abare , Abear , Aber , Eber , and Ebert .
German: variant of   Heber   1.

variants.name: Herber
meanings: German and Dutch: variant of   Herbert  .

variants.name: Herbertson
meanings: Scottish (Glasgow): patronymic from the Older Scots and Middle English personal name   Herbert  .

variants.name: Hebb
meanings: English (East Yorkshire and northeast Midlands): from the Middle English personal name Hebb, Ebb, pet forms of Herbert .

variants.name: Herb
meanings: South German: nickname for a harsh or rough person, from Middle High German herb ‘tart, harsh’.
German: from the personal name Herpo, a pet form of Herbert .

nameMeanings.name: Magred
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of Margaret .

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Mared
meanings: Simplified form of   Marged .

en.lifeSummary: When Magred verch Herbert was born in 1419, in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales, her father, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, was 18 and her mother, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, was 35. She had at least 3 sons and 7 daughters with Henry Dwnn. She died in Wiston, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magred verch Herbert est née en 1419, à Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, son père, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, avait 35 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles avec Henry Dwnn. Elle est décédée à Wiston, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magred verch Herbert 1419 in Raglan, Monmouthshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG 18 und ihre Mutter Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam 35. Sie hatte mit Henry Dwnn mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb in Wiston, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

ht.of Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magred verch Herbert è nata il nel 1419 nel Raglan, Monmouthshire, Galles, sua padre, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, aveva 35 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie con Henry Dwnn. Morì nel Wiston, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Magred verch Herbertが1419年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアラグランで生まれた時，父Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KGは18歳，母Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gamは35歳であった。彼女はHenry Dwnnとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘をもうけた。彼女はウェールズペンブロケシュアイアウィストンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Magred verch Herbert(이)가 1419년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 라글런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 Henry Dwnn(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 웨일스 p브로케실르 와이스턴에서 사망했다.

mg.of Pembrokeshire, Wales: Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, United Kingdom

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magred verch Herbert nasceu em 1419, em Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, seu pai, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tinha 35 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas com Henry Dwnn. Ela faleceu em Wiston, Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magred verch Herbert родилась в 1419 г. в местности раглан, монмоутшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, 35. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей от Henry Dwnn. Она умерла в местности вистон, пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magred verch Herbert nació en 1419, en Raglan, Monmouthshire, Gales, su papá, Sir William ap Thomas Herbert KG, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Gwladys ferch Dafydd Gam, tenía 35 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas con Henry Dwnn. Murió en Wiston, Pembrokeshire, Gales.
